title: Arwanos Architecture Overview
content: Arwanos uses a 3-tier architecture: (1) UI layer — CustomTkinter desktop GUI with markdown rendering and real-time streaming. (2) Agent layer — async command router with ARM (Adaptive Resource Manager) that profiles queries and assigns compute budgets. (3) Data layer — ChromaDB vector store for RAG, psychoanalytical.json for journal analysis, conversation history for context. The ARM system classifies every query into resource profiles 0-3, adjusting context window, token limits, and search depth accordingly.

title: ARM Resource Profiles
content: Profile 0 (micro): greetings, simple questions. num_ctx=512, num_predict=640. Profile 1 (standard): normal conversation. num_ctx=2048, num_predict=960. Profile 2 (extended): complex reasoning, code analysis. num_ctx=4096, num_predict=1280. Profile 3 (deep): web search, RAG, full journal analysis. num_ctx=8192, num_predict=1600. The ARM prevents resource waste on simple queries while ensuring deep tasks have full compute available.

title: LovelyQ Feature
content: The /lovelyq command performs psychoanalytical analysis of the user's journal entries. It uses Python-first preprocessing: keyword extraction from the question → sentence-level matching against journal entries → focused context assembly (~2000 tokens) → single LLM call. Intent detection classifies the question into 6 categories: behavioral patterns, emotional state, avoidance behavior, contradictions, growth areas, or general reflection. Custom response format can be saved via '/lovelyq set <instructions>'.

title: Key Design Principles
content: 1. Local-first: all processing runs on-device, no cloud required. 2. Privacy: journal data never leaves the machine. 3. Honest companion: Arwanos is designed to be honest, not just kind — it names patterns directly. 4. Adaptive: the ARM system scales resource usage to the task. 5. Extensible: custom prompts, importable sessions, pluggable data sources. 6. Human-centered: the companion relationship is the core feature, not the technology.
